overall.description: A cinematic third-person scene from the video game Ghost of Tsushima depicts a samurai warrior in traditional armor slowly walking around a massive illuminated cherry blossom tree at night. The serene setting features a roadside shrine with a hanging paper lantern and candles, surrounded by falling petals and a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cherry blossom tree with illuminated roadside shrine

events.description: samurai character transitions from standing to slowly walking around the tree

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior slowly circling the cherry blossom tree while observing the shrine and surroundings

entered.detail: massive tree with dense white-pink blossoms dominating the center of the frame
traditional Japanese paper lantern glowing warm orange, suspended from the tree branch
small wooden altar structure at the base of the tree with offerings
multiple small candles burning at the base of the shrine
narrow dirt trail running alongside the tree through the grass field
additional cherry blossom trees visible in the background under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous, slow exploration of a serene nighttime scene centered on a massive cherry blossom tree with a traditional shrine. The samurai character walks gently around the tree while cherry blossom petals fall through the air. The warm glow of the hanging lantern contrasts with the cool blue moonlight, illuminating the small shrine and candles at the tree's base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous, slow exploration of a serene nighttime landscape centered on a massive, illuminated cherry blossom tree. It begins by focusing on the samurai character as he walks gently around the ancient tree, with delicate petals drifting through the air. As the camera glides, the warm glow of a hanging lantern begins to contrast with the cool blue moonlight, casting a soft light over the surrounding environment. The scene then shifts to reveal a traditional roadside shrine at the tree's base, where flickering candles illuminate the sacred space before the camera completes its graceful circuit.
